name: Bemi
description: Bemi — Automatic database change tracking extension for Postgres providing immutable audit logs via CDC.

seo.title: Bemi — DBaaS / Serverless Databases
seo.meta_description: Bemi: Bemi — Automatic database change tracking extension for Postgres providing immutable audit logs via CDC.

when_to_use: Immutable audit log for all Postgres table changes via CDC
GDPR-compliant change history without application-layer code
Debugging data mutations in production Postgres databases
Replacing manual audit tables with automatic Postgres CDC

pros: Immutable audit trail via Postgres CDC
Tracks who and why, not just what
Useful for SOC2 and HIPAA audits
cons: Pricing can add up for busy databases
review.verdict: Neat audit logging add-on for Postgres teams, overkill unless compliance explicitly requires immutable history.
review.best_for: Postgres shops needing SOC2/HIPAA-grade immutable audit trails with minimal code change
review.not_for: Teams on non-Postgres databases or without formal compliance requirements
